title: lagenocarpus celiae
intro: Lagenocarpus celiae is a type of plant species belonging to the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of grass or sedge. The medicinal properties of Lagenocarpus celiae include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Lagenocarpus celiae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other minor health issues.
